verse_text: Then they took the body of Jesus, and bound it in strips of linen with the spices, as the custom of the Jews is to bury.

links.context: This passage was fulfilled by Nicodemus and Joseph of Arimathea ([[JOH.19:39]]-41) when the Lord was anointed again after his death, covered with myrrh and bundled in linen. He will take rest in the Church.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
